name: investorclaw
description: Claude Code plugin marketplace entry for InvestorClaw — deterministic portfolio analysis and market intelligence.

metadata.description: InvestorClaw marketplace — Claude Code plugin for portfolio analysis (holdings, performance, bonds, analyst consensus, news correlation, multi-factor synthesis, optimization). Container-first: pulls the public ic-engine image and drives it over MCP-HTTP. No source build, no uv bootstrap.

plugins.name: investorclaw
plugins.description: Multi-account portfolio analysis: holdings snapshots, performance metrics, bond analytics (YTM, duration, FRED-backed benchmarks), analyst consensus, news correlation, multi-factor synthesis, optimization, CSV/Excel reporting, and CME futures pricing (Yahoo Finance by default; optional Massive for futures/premium). Deterministic signed-envelope pipeline; built-in financial-advice guardrails (educational output only). Runs the prebuilt ic-engine container over MCP-HTTP. Free by default (Yahoo Finance), no API key required.
